name: Performance Correlations & Interventions
description: Root cause analysis and intervention effectiveness tracking

cards.title: Key Performance Correlations
cards.query:
SELECT 
                                correlation_pair as "Correlation",
                                ROUND(correlation_coefficient, 3) as "Strength",
                                data_points as "Data Points",
                                expected_direction as "Expected Direction",
                                strength as "Band"
                            FROM main_main_analytics.v_performance_correlations
                            ORDER BY ABS(correlation_coefficient) DESC

cards.title: Intervention Status
cards.query:
SELECT 
                                strength as "Status",
                                COUNT(*) as "Correlations"
                            FROM main_main_analytics.v_performance_correlations
                            WHERE strength IS NOT NULL
                            GROUP BY strength
                            ORDER BY "Correlations" DESC

cards.title: Average Absolute Correlation (%)
cards.query:
SELECT 
                                expected_direction as "Type",
                                ROUND(AVG(ABS(correlation_coefficient)) * 100.0, 1) as "Completion %"
                            FROM main_main_analytics.v_performance_correlations
                            WHERE expected_direction IS NOT NULL
                            GROUP BY expected_direction
                            ORDER BY "Completion %" DESC

cards.title: Correlation Effect by Direction
cards.query:
SELECT 
                                expected_direction as "Intervention Type",
                                COUNT(*) as "Students Served",
                                ROUND(AVG(correlation_coefficient), 3) as "Avg Outcome Improvement",
                                ROUND(AVG(ABS(correlation_coefficient)) * 100.0, 1) as "Success Rate %"
                            FROM main_main_analytics.v_performance_correlations
                            WHERE expected_direction IS NOT NULL
                            GROUP BY expected_direction
                            ORDER BY "Avg Outcome Improvement" DESC
